info.title: Hotmart API
info.description: The Hotmart API provides access to Hotmart's digital product platform services including sales, subscriptions, products, members area (club), coupons, tickets, payment links, and account management. All operations use resource-oriented URLs with HTTP methods (GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE) and return JSON responses.

tags.name: Subscriptions
tags.description: Manage subscriptions, subscribers, and subscription lifecycle

tags.name: Sales
tags.description: Access sales history, summaries, user details, commissions, and pricing

tags.name: Members Area
tags.description: Hotmart Club (Members Area) - modules, pages, users, and lessons

tags.name: Products
tags.description: Product listing, configuration, offers, and plans

tags.name: Coupons
tags.description: Create, list, and delete discount coupons

tags.name: Negotiations
tags.description: Generate payment negotiations for overdue subscriptions

tags.name: Payment Links
tags.description: Create and manage payment links with offers and plans

get.description: List all subscribers with filtering by status, dates, and other criteria.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Subscription status filter. Can be repeated for multiple statuses.

parameters.name: date_next_charge
parameters.description: Start date for next charge filter (epoch milliseconds).

parameters.name: end_date_next_charge
parameters.description: End date for next charge filter (epoch milliseconds).

200.description: Successful response with list of subscribers.

get.description: Retrieve a summary of subscriptions with lifecycle and billing details.
Retrieve transaction details for subscriptions.
List all purchases associated with a specific subscription.

post.description: Cancel a single subscription by subscriber code.

send_mail.description: Whether to send a cancellation email to the subscriber.

post.description: Cancel multiple subscriptions in a single request.

subscriber_code.description: List of subscriber codes to cancel.

charge.description: Whether to immediately charge the subscriber upon reactivation.

post.description: Reactivate multiple cancelled subscriptions in a single request.

subscriber_code.description: List of subscriber codes to reactivate.

patch.description: Change the billing due day for a subscription. Value must be between 1 and 31.

due_day.description: The new due day for the subscription (1-31).

get.summary: Get available plans for plan switch
get.description: Get the available plans that a subscriber can switch to.

parameters.name: subscriber_codes
parameters.description: Subscriber code to check available plans for.

post.description: Switch a subscriber to a different plan.

offer_code.description: The offer code of the target plan.

get.description: Retrieve the sales history with filtering options.
Retrieve a summary of sales totals.
Retrieve user details (producer, buyer, affiliates) for sales transactions.
Retrieve commission details for sales transactions.
Retrieve detailed pricing breakdown for sales including base price, VAT, fees, and coupons.

put.description: Request a refund for a specific transaction.

get.description: List all modules in the Members Area (Hotmart Club).
List all pages in a module. Pages can be of type CONTENT, ADVERTISEMENT, QUIZ, or WEBINAR.
List all pages in a module with enhanced dripping configuration details.

200.description: List of pages with dripping configs.

get.description: List all users in the Members Area.
List all lessons and completion status for a specific user.
Retrieve a list of all products.
Retrieve all offers for a specific product.
Retrieve all subscription plans for a specific product.

put.description: Update configuration settings for a product.

is_allowed_to_email_the_buyer.description: Whether affiliates are allowed to email the buyer.

post.description: Create a new discount coupon for a product.

get.description: Retrieve coupons for a specific product.

delete.description: Delete a specific coupon by its ID.

get.description: Retrieve information about a specific event.
Retrieve the list of participants for a specific event.

post.description: Generate a negotiation for overdue subscription payments, supporting PIX and other payment methods with optional discounts.

get.description: List all payment links.

post.description: Create a new payment link with checkout and subscription configuration.
Add an additional offer to an existing payment link.
Add an additional subscription plan to an existing payment link.
Charge a payment link token with a specific value amount.
Charge a payment link token using a specific offer code.
Retrieve account details using a GraphQL-style query. The request body accepts a query string specifying which fields to return.

query.description: GraphQL-style query string to select account fields.

bearerAuth.description: OAuth 2.0 Bearer token obtained from POST https://api-sec-vlc.hotmart.com/security/oauth/token with client_credentials grant type.

basicAuth.description: Basic authentication used for the OAuth token endpoint. Credentials are generated in Hotmart platform under Tools > Developer Credentials.

PageToken.name: page_token
PageToken.description: Token for pagination. Use next_page_token or prev_page_token from the response.

MaxResults.name: max_results
MaxResults.description: Maximum number of results per page.

NotFound.description: The requested resource was not found.

discount.description: Discount value (decimal for percentage, e.g., 0.1 for 10%).

recurrences.description: List of recurrence numbers to negotiate.
